emailImport.intro: Scan recent Gmail for subscription-related messages, or paste email text. On iPhone, select text in Mail or Safari, tap Share, then choose subradax to bring it here. You confirm each item before it is saved. Gmail scanning signs in with Google (read-only) to search messages for your keywords.
emailImport.introNoGmail: Paste or share billing, email, or SMS text to parse renewals on device. You confirm each item before it is saved. On iPhone, use Share from Mail, Safari, or other apps to open subradax with that text.
emailImport.pasteEmpty: Nothing to parse — the text box is empty. Copy text from a message or email and paste again, or wait a moment if a draft is restoring.
emailImport.noClientIds: Gmail scanning isn’t available in this build. You can still paste text below or use Share from Mail and other apps. Try updating the app or contact support if this persists.
emailImport.empty: No matches yet. Try more keywords or paste an email that mentions renewals and an amount (e.g. $9.99).
emailImport.partialParse: Only partial fields were found — add a subscription keyword and an amount in the text to create a row here. You can still copy structured JSON (for example, for Shortcuts).
emailImport.smartBlurb: Paste or share bill text only: we extract fields on this device. No inbox required for this path. SMS: wording like 代扣/包月/元 is supported.
emailImport.shareInboxEmpty: Nothing to import. Try sharing again from Mail or another app.

renewals.empty: Add streaming, apps, or any recurring charge. We’ll remind you before the next bill.
renewals.swipeHint: Swipe left or tap “Summary” above to see totals.
renewals.notifDisabledHint: Notifications are off. Reminders cannot fire until you allow them in system settings.

summary.empty: Add renewals to see estimated monthly and yearly totals (by currency).

cloud.title: Cloud sync
cloud.signedIn: Signed in — backup or restore your list.

settings.planAllIncluded: This release includes every feature: unlimited entries and export.
settings.expoBannerBody: In-app purchases aren’t available in this preview. Install the App Store or TestFlight build to test purchases. The toggle below only simulates Pro for UI while previewing.
settings.planFree: Free limit: %{limit} renewals. Pro: unlimited + export.
settings.androidProNote: Premium is only on iPhone & iPad (App Store). This Android build stays within the free limit.
settings.notifOff: Open system Settings › subradax to allow notifications.
settings.exportBackupHint: Your list stays on this device only—it isn’t synced account-wide to other devices. Export with Pro before switching phones or reinstalling the app.
settings.privacyBody: Renewals are stored on this device only. This version does not automatically sync them across your devices. Before switching phones or reinstalling, use Pro export to keep a backup.
settings.privacyNoAnalytics: We don’t collect analytics in this app; reminders use local notifications only.
settings.cloudHint: If optional web sync is added later, we’ll explain it when the feature ships.
settings.shareUnavailableBody: Cannot open share sheet on this device.

form.name: Name
form.cancelUrlHint: Paste the provider’s subscription or account page (https). subradax does not cancel for you — this only opens the link.
form.errorCancelUrl: Enter a valid http(s) URL, or leave blank.

paywall.iapDisabledBody: In-app purchases are not enabled in this build. All features are included.
paywall.title: subradax Pro
paywall.subtitle: Unlimited renewals, reminders, and export. Data stays on your device.
paywall.bullet3: • Export your list from Settings (back up before switching or reinstalling)
paywall.expoWarn: If plans don’t load, check your connection and try again, or use Restore purchases.
paywall.loadingPlans: Loading plans… If this hangs, confirm subscriptions exist in App Store Connect and match IDs: %{ids}.
paywall.pricingNote: Prices vary by region. Introductory or promotional pricing, if you’re eligible, is confirmed at checkout.
paywall.androidOnlyBody: subradax Premium is sold on the App Store (iPhone & iPad). This Android build has no in-app subscription yet; you can still use the app within the free limit.

notifications.firstSaveMessage: We’ll send a local notification before each charge. You can change this anytime in Settings.
notifications.scheduleIncomplete: Some reminders could not be scheduled.
